_rationale: C++ inspect emits one additional field beyond Go's shape: `signature` (the source-level function signature extracted by tree-sitter). Documented intentional richness. The older _rationale referencing annotations/callers/callees/parameter_count/receiver_type was aspirational; those fields are not currently emitted. Locked by tests/git_test.cpp:GitReportToJson and tests/cli_test.cpp.
